title: Downloading Word docs with Monday comments
excerpt: Hi there. Is there a way to download Word docs (already uploaded to Monday) with comments in tact?

posts.author: SDH (SDH)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi there. Is there a way to download Word docs (already uploaded to Monday) with comments in tact?

posts.author: GiannisKoukounas (Giannis Koukounas)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @SDH !

Welcome to the monday community!

Unfortunately I am not aware of any way to download a monday doc with the comments included.

Perhaps @BiancaT can let us know if this on a table as a future feature .

Best Regards,
Giannis , Implementation Consultant at thespelas.com

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @SDH!

Just to clarify, are you referring to downloading the annotations made to the doc via the platform?
